nasb.text: At the end of seven years, the woman returned from the land of the Philistines; and she went out to appeal to the king for her house and for her field.

esv.text: And at the end of the seven years, when the woman returned from the land of the Philistines, she went to appeal to the king for her house and her land.

cnv.text: 七年結束的時候，那婦人從非利士地回來，就去為自己的房屋、田產哀求王。

ccb.text: 七年后，她从非利士返回，去向王请求收回自己的房屋和田地。
